channel.title: it's giving news
channel.description: James and Anne make the morning make sense before the day starts yelling. Markets, tech, politics, sports, culture, local stories, and the weird incentives underneath them. Dry, current, and allergic to cringe.
channel.itunes:author: Reid McGill
channel.itunes:summary: A daily morning briefing with James and Anne. ~25 minutes. Mondays through Fridays.
channel.itunes:subtitle: A sharp morning briefing with James and Anne.

item.title: The Agent Shift Reaches The Board
item.description: James and Anne walk the morning board. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.itunes:summary: James and Anne walk the morning board. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.content:encoded: James and Anne walk the morning board. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill

item.title: Government Outsourcing the Brain to Anthropic
item.description: Topics: FAA, NASA, Anthropic, Dutton Ranch. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.itunes:summary: Topics: FAA, NASA, Anthropic, Dutton Ranch. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.content:encoded: Topics: FAA, NASA, Anthropic, Dutton Ranch. Hosted by James and Anne. it's giving news ships every weekday morning.
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill
